nodes.standard_name: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
nodes.original_text_name: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
nodes.context: Federation of 12 armed groups led by Jimmy Chérizier, controls over 80% of Port-au-Prince.
Armed group supportive of the Haitian Government, rival of G9.
Coalition formed by G9 and G-Pèp in February 2024.
Ally of G9 according to infobox.
Ally of G9 according to infobox.
Ally of G9 according to infobox.
Former ally of G9 until 2021, denied.
Rival of G9 according to infobox.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
edges.evidence_quote: The G9 had a rivalry with the G-Pèp, an armed group supportive of the Haitian Government.
edges.context: G9 and G-Pèp were rivals, with clashes in 2022.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
edges.evidence_quote: On February 29, 2024, the G9 family set aside its rivalry with the G-Pèp and formed a coalition: Viv Ansanm.
edges.context: G9 and G-Pèp formed a coalition called Viv Ansanm in 2024.

edges.source: Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family and Allies
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Zoe Pound , Zoe Nation, Zoe Mafia Family
edges.context: Zoe Pound is listed as an ally of G9 in the infobox.
